stocks.impact_theory: Biogen announced acquisition of Apellis to enhance immunology portfolio, sparking massive rally. Economic boost from deal premium (~150% implied), market psychology FOMO on biotech M&A wave. Historical parallel: similar surges in Allergan (2019). Analogies: lottery winner euphoria; snowball effect in momentum trading.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Acquisition news confirmed via investor site, X sentiment positive on biotech deals (semantic search shows excitement), web news highlights growth outlook. Expect continuation on regulatory approval.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 15-25% gains on deal close, target $50.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short if deal breaks (-20% risk).
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Deal failure, antitrust issues, market selloff.

stocks.justification: Clear acquisition catalyst, massive volume, strong news confirmation.

stocks.impact_theory: Eli Lilly acquiring Centessa for sleep-wake disorder pipeline. Premium valuation drives surge. Implications: Lilly diversification, psych market growth. Parallels: previous pharma buys like Seagen. Analogies: cherry on sundae for LLY; rising tide lifts biotech boats.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Press release on Lilly deal, positive X chatter on orexin agonists, news supports pipeline value.

stocks.justification: Direct acquisition news, aligns with biotech M&A trend.

stocks.impact_theory: $29B Jetro acquisition expands cash & carry, but debt load concerns trigger selloff. Psych: dilution fears. Parallels: Kraft-Heinz debt issues. Analogies: overeating at buffet (indigestion); buying big truck you can't afford.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Citi downgrade on debt, X neutral-negative, web highlights risks despite synergies.

stocks.justification: Strong news but mixed analyst views.

stocks.impact_theory: Positive Phase 3 TETON-1 trial for Tyvaso in IPF, new 52w high. Expands PAH market. Psych: validation rally. Parallels: similar biotech trial pops. Analogies: home run in extra innings; key unlocking new revenue door.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Trial success news, analyst upgrades (BofA), X positive biotech sentiment.

stocks.justification: Solid trial data, but no M&A like others.

stocks.impact_theory: 2026 guidance $11-12 EPS misses consensus $11.73, despite capex/buyback. Psych: disappointment in growth stock. Parallels: utility guidance cuts. Analogies: promise of feast, served appetizer; high expectations crash.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Guidance below expectations per news, X market rebound but stock-specific negative.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: AI energy demand surge, rate cuts.
